sources_note: 資料來源：TechCrunch、Digiday、MediaPost、Campaign Asia、Anthropic、Canva／Kling 官方、Fortune、AP News、China Daily HK、Social Media Today、Adobe、Runway；smol.ai、量子位、深響補充。
sources_note_en: Sources: TechCrunch, Digiday, MediaPost, Campaign Asia, Anthropic, Canva & Kling newsrooms, Fortune, AP News, China Daily HK, Social Media Today, Adobe Creative Cloud, Runway AI, smol.ai.
sections: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
廣告平台 & 行銷科技
行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro 三度跳票，Google 或改推「Gemini 3.6 Flash」過渡版
items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro Misses Third Deadline; Google Weighing Stopgap 'Gemini 3.6 Flash'
items.summary: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 再次延誤，三度錯過發布目標。傳 Google 研究推出 Gemini 3.6 Flash 作過渡，Alphabet 股價跌約4%，官方仍未有新時間表。
items.summary_en: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro missed its third consecutive release target on July 17. Google is reportedly exploring a stopgap 'Gemini 3.6 Flash' release. No model card has been published and Alphabet shares fell ~4% on the news.
items.why: 評估 Gemini 做廣告或搜尋工具嘅 agency 宜暫緩落實，等正式發布先決定
items.why_en: Agencies evaluating Gemini for client campaign tools should pause adoption plans until Google stabilises its flagship model release timeline.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Google 研發 Frozen v2 AI 晶片，目標令 Gemini 效能提升6-10倍
items.title_en: Google Develops 'Frozen v2' AI Chip Targeting 6–10x Gemini Efficiency Gains
items.summary: Google 研發代號 Frozen v2 嘅 AI 伺服器晶片，目標令 Gemini 每單位能耗嘅推理效能提升6-10倍，預計2028年落地，屆時 API 成本料大幅下降。
items.summary_en: Google is developing an internal server chip codenamed Frozen v2, targeting 6–10x efficiency gains over current AI chips measured in tokens per unit of power. If successful, it could dramatically reduce Gemini API costs when it ships around 2028.
items.why: 長線規劃 AI 工具成本嘅 agency，2028年 Gemini API 成本料有重大轉變
items.why_en: Agencies planning long-term AI production cost structures should factor in potential sharp Gemini API price drops around 2028.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Apple Intelligence 獲批入華，搭載阿里 Qwen 模型
items.title_en: Apple Intelligence Approved for China Launch, Powered by Alibaba's Qwen AI
items.summary: 中國網信辦7月15日批准 Apple Intelligence 以阿里 Qwen 模型入華，阿里同百度股各升約5%，或成外資科技公司 AI 功能入華嘅新合規模式。
items.summary_en: China's CAC approved Apple Intelligence for mainland launch on July 15, powered by Alibaba's Qwen model. Alibaba and Baidu shares each jumped ~5%, setting a precedent for foreign tech firms entering China with a domestic AI partnership.
items.why: Qwen 將覆蓋中國所有新 iPhone，品牌在華 AI 投放策略要納入 Qwen 生態
items.why_en: Qwen's reach across every new iPhone in China makes it a priority AI ecosystem for brands planning China-market content and targeting strategies.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Kimi K3 震撼發布：2.8萬億參數，7月27日免費公開模型權重
items.title_en: Moonshot AI Unveils Kimi K3: 2.8 Trillion Parameters, Free Open Weights Dropping July 27
items.summary: 中國 Moonshot AI 喺 WAIC 發布 Kimi K3，2.8萬億參數、1M token 上下文，每百萬 token 約$3，計劃7月27日全面公開模型權重，性能比肩 GPT-5 系列。
items.summary_en: China's Moonshot AI unveiled Kimi K3 at WAIC Shanghai — 2.8 trillion parameters, 1M token context window, priced at ~$3 per million tokens. Full open model weights are planned for July 27, rivalling GPT-5-class models at a fraction of the cost.
items.why: 超低價高效能中文模型，Agency 做大量中國市場 AI 內容生產可大幅慳成本
items.why_en: An ultra-low-cost frontier Chinese-language model could significantly cut content production costs for agencies running large-scale China campaigns.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: WAIC 2026：螞蟻、騰訊、阿里、百度同週各自推企業 AI Agent 平台
items.title_en: WAIC 2026: Ant, Tencent, Alibaba and Baidu All Launch Enterprise AI Agent Platforms in the Same Week
items.summary: WAIC 上海2026期間，四大中國科技巨頭在同一週內相繼發布企業AI Agent平台，主打自動化辦公流程。中國企業級 AI 代理人競賽正式爆發。
items.summary_en: At WAIC Shanghai 2026, all four Chinese tech giants launched competing enterprise AI agent platforms in the same week, focusing on automated business workflows rather than consumer apps. China's enterprise AI agent race is now fully underway.
items.why: 中國客戶同供應商工作流程將快速引入 AI 代理人，Agency 要提前評估合作影響
items.why_en: China's business ecosystem will rapidly adopt AI agents — agencies should assess how client and supplier workflows will shift before it affects delivery timelines.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: MCP（AI 助手接口標準）升級無狀態架構，企業部署成本大降
items.title_en: MCP Protocol Goes Stateless — Enterprise AI Automation Deployment Costs Slashed
items.summary: MCP（畀 AI 助手直接連接外部工具嘅接口標準）切換無狀態架構，大幅降低企業規模部署成本同複雜度，同時獲批成為正式 IETF 網絡標準。
items.summary_en: MCP — the protocol connecting AI models to external tools like ad platforms and databases — has shifted to a stateless session model. This dramatically cuts large-scale deployment costs and complexity. MCP has also been ratified as an official IETF standard.
items.why: Agency 建立 AI 自動化工作流（廣告報告、數據拉取）嘅部署成本更低更快
items.why_en: Agencies building AI-powered automations for reporting, data pulls, or campaign management will find MCP-based integrations cheaper and faster to deploy.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Anthropic 推 AI 罕見病研究資助計劃，深耕醫療專業市場
items.title_en: Anthropic Launches AI for Science Rare Disease Grant — Up to $50K in Claude API Credits
items.summary: Anthropic 向罕見病研究機構及早期生物科技公司提供最高 $5萬美元 Claude API 使用額度，截止8月2日申請，顯示其積極開拓醫療等監管嚴格嘅垂直行業。
items.summary_en: Anthropic is offering up to $50,000 in Claude API credits to researchers and early-stage biotechs working on rare genetic diseases, with an August 2 application deadline. The program signals Anthropic's push into regulated professional verticals.
items.why: Claude 在醫療等專業領域能力增長，未來服務藥企客戶時可考慮納入 AI 方案
items.why_en: Claude's expanding capabilities in regulated sectors signal growing opportunity for agencies serving pharmaceutical or medical brand clients with AI solutions.
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態

items.title: Stagwell Curate 今日正式上線：廣告集團首個自建 AI 程序化採購市場
items.title_en: Stagwell Curate Officially Launches — First Major Holding Group AI Programmatic Marketplace Goes Live
items.summary: Stagwell Curate 今日（7月21日）正式啟動，透過 AI 整合 CTV、影片、展示及音頻庫存，接入 Freewheel、Magnite 同 The Trade Desk，向內外部廣告主開放。
items.summary_en: Stagwell Curate officially launched on July 21, offering AI-matched inventory curation across CTV, video, display and audio. It integrates with Freewheel, Magnite and The Trade Desk's Sincera, open to both Stagwell clients and external advertisers.
items.why: 大型廣告集團將程序化採購內部化，獨立 agency 要重新評估供應路徑策略
items.why_en: A major holding group bringing programmatic curation fully in-house sets a new competitive benchmark — independent agencies must reassess their supply path strategies.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Q2 開放網絡廣告庫存縮水40%，AI 搜尋正式動搖 Programmatic 根基
items.title_en: Open-Web Ad Supply Plunged Up to 40% in Q2 as AI Search Destroys Publisher Traffic
items.summary: Ozone 分析 200億次曝光後發現，AI 零點擊搜尋令開放網頁流量大跌，Q2 開放網絡廣告庫存同比縮水 32-41%，展示廣告嘅可採購面積正快速收縮。
items.summary_en: Ozone's analysis of 20 billion ad impressions reveals open-web publisher ad supply fell 32–41% YoY in Q2 2026, as AI zero-click search cut publisher page loads and destroyed programmatic inventory. Open-web display ad space is shrinking fast.
items.why: 程序化媒體計劃要加速轉向封閉平台，繼續押注開放網絡嘅風險持續升高
items.why_en: Media plans heavily weighted toward open-web programmatic face growing risk — accelerate the shift to curated or walled-garden supply before inventory shrinks further.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Meta Andromeda 全面接管：廣告素材多元化正式取代受眾定向
items.title_en: Meta Andromeda Complete: Ad Creative Diversity Is Now the Primary Targeting Signal
items.summary: Meta Project Andromeda 已完全取代傳統受眾定向，AI 讀廣告素材內容決定投放對象。每隔2-3週更新8-12款多元素材嘅廣告主，ROAS 平均提升22%。
items.summary_en: Meta's Project Andromeda has fully replaced traditional audience targeting — Meta's AI reads ad content to determine who sees it. Advertisers refreshing 8–12 diverse creatives every 2–3 weeks are reporting 22% average ROAS gains.
items.why: 素材策略係 Meta 投放成效嘅核心，Agency 整個 campaign 架構要圍繞素材更新重建
items.why_en: Creative strategy is now the #1 Meta performance lever — agencies must rebuild their campaign workflow around diverse and frequently-refreshed creatives to stay competitive.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: TikTok World 2026：Symphony Agent 支援對話式 AI 廣告設置
items.title_en: TikTok World 2026: Symphony Agent Enables Conversational AI Ad Creation and Optimisation
items.summary: TikTok 於 TikTok World 2026 發布 Symphony Agent，品牌可透過對話介面喺 TikTok One 建立、擴充同優化廣告活動，同步擴大 Dentsu 業務整合。
items.summary_en: TikTok unveiled Symphony Agent at TikTok World 2026, enabling brands to build, scale and optimise campaigns through a conversational interface inside TikTok One. The launch also expands TikTok's Dentsu integration for agency clients.
items.why: 對話式設置 TikTok 廣告，大幅縮短中國及國際市場廣告活動上線時間
items.why_en: Conversational campaign setup in TikTok One can significantly cut the time agencies spend briefing, launching and iterating on TikTok campaigns.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: 小紅書強制執行 AI 內容標識，AI 代操帳號遭限流或封號
items.title_en: Xiaohongshu Enforces Mandatory AI Content Labels — AI-Operated Accounts Face Restrictions or Bans
items.summary: 小紅書宣布強制執行 AI 內容披露標識，由 AI 工具代運營嘅帳號將受流量限制甚至封號，商業帖文須雙重披露，無緩衝期即時生效。
items.summary_en: Xiaohongshu is enforcing mandatory AI content disclosure labels, with AI-operated accounts facing traffic restrictions or bans. Commercial posts require dual-layer disclosure. The policy is effective immediately with no grace period.
items.why: KOC 帳號及品牌帖文若用 AI 生成內容，即要加標識否則面臨封號風險
items.why_en: Any KOC account or branded note using AI-generated content on XHS must add disclosure labels now — non-compliance risks account bans and full campaign blackouts.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: 中國直播電商新規落實：AI 虛擬主播帶貨必須標明 AI 身份
items.title_en: China Livestream Rules Now Enforced: AI Virtual Hosts Must Declare AI Identity When Selling
items.summary: 中國《直播廣告管理規定》七月正式執行，AI 虛擬主播做電商帶貨必須標明 AI 身份，平台須對誤導性 AI 廣告內容負連帶責任。
items.summary_en: China's Livestream Advertising Measures are now being fully enforced in July. AI virtual hosts selling products via livestream must explicitly declare AI identity, and platforms are jointly liable for misleading AI-generated commercial content.
items.why: 用 AI 虛擬 KOL 做抖音或淘寶直播嘅品牌，要立即加入身份披露否則連累平台
items.why_en: Brands using AI virtual KOLs for Douyin or Taobao livestream commerce must add AI identity disclosure immediately — non-compliance exposes the platform to joint liability.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: 《AI 擬人化互動辦法》生效：字節、阿里、騰訊即停用 AI 人設功能
items.title_en: China AI Anthropomorphic Service Rules Take Effect — ByteDance, Alibaba, Tencent Remove AI Persona Features
items.summary: 《AI擬人化互動服務辦法》7月15日生效，Doubao、Qwen、元寶即停用用戶自創 AI 人設功能，係中國首部針對擬人化 AI 互動嘅專項法規。
items.summary_en: China's Interim Measures on AI Anthropomorphic Interactive Services took effect July 15. Doubao, Qwen Chat and Yuanbao all immediately disabled user-created AI persona features — the first Chinese law specifically targeting human-like AI interaction.
items.why: 品牌若在中國平台用 AI 虛擬人做互動行銷，要即刻核查合規否則帳號被封禁
items.why_en: Brands using AI virtual personas for interactive marketing on Chinese platforms must urgently audit compliance — non-compliant accounts face immediate bans.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Google 廣告加入「AI 製作說明」面板，第三方 AI 需人工申報
items.title_en: Google Rolls Out 'How This Ad Was Made' AI Transparency Panel Across Search, YouTube and Discover
items.summary: Google 喺 Search、YouTube 及 Discover 廣告加入「呢個廣告點製作」披露面板。使用 Google 自家 AI 工具嘅廣告自動標示，第三方 AI 工具需廣告主手動申報。
items.summary_en: Google rolled out a 'How this ad was made' transparency panel across Search, YouTube and Discover. Ads using Google's own AI tools auto-disclose; ads using third-party AI tools require the advertiser to manually declare AI involvement.
items.why: Agency 用第三方 AI 製作 Google 廣告素材，需手動標示 AI 涉及度否則恐違規
items.why_en: Agencies using third-party AI tools to produce Google ad creatives must manually declare AI involvement — risk non-compliance as AI disclosure requirements tighten globally.
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技

items.title: Canva AI 2.0 上線：自家設計基礎模型，對話式生成完整可編輯設計
items.title_en: Canva AI 2.0 Launches with Proprietary Design Foundation Model and Agentic Multi-Tool Creation
items.summary: Canva AI 2.0 推出自家設計基礎模型，用文字描述即可生成完整可編輯設計，AI 代理人可記住品牌偏好並處理端對端設計任務，無需切換工具。
items.summary_en: Canva AI 2.0 debuts with a proprietary design foundation model that generates fully-layered, editable designs from text prompts. Its conversational AI agent can remember brand preferences and handle end-to-end design workflows without tool-switching.
items.why: 廣告團隊可直接用文字簡報出可製作嘅素材，大幅縮短設計往返改稿時間
items.why_en: Ad teams can brief Canva in plain language and receive production-ready, editable campaign assets — cutting design round-trip time and reducing handoffs.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: 可靈 AI 3.0 上線：原生 4K 輸出，支援跨片段角色一致性
items.title_en: Kling AI 3.0 Launches: Native 4K Output and Element Library for Cross-Clip Character Consistency
items.summary: 可靈 AI VIDEO 3.0 支援原生 4K 輸出、原生音效同步、精確15秒片段控制，同時推出 Element Library 系統，可跨多個片段保持角色同物件一致性。
items.summary_en: Kling AI VIDEO 3.0 introduces native 4K output, native audio sync, precise 15-second sequences, and an Element Library system for maintaining consistent characters and objects across multiple clips.
items.why: 跨片段角色一致性問題已解決，最適合製作系列化品牌影片或多集抖音廣告素材
items.why_en: Cross-clip character consistency is now solved — ideal for producing serialised brand video campaigns or multi-part Douyin ad creatives without continuity issues.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: Pika 2.5 推出物理引擎 AI 影片，免費版每月約80點
items.title_en: Pika 2.5 Launches Physics-Based AI Video with Free Tier — 80 Monthly Credits
items.summary: Pika 2.5 加入物理引擎互動功能，令 AI 影片中嘅物件動作更真實。保留免費版（每月約80點）、1080p 輸出同 Pikaformance 對嘴功能，適合快速原型製作。
items.summary_en: Pika 2.5 introduces physics-based object interaction for more realistic motion in AI-generated video. The platform retains a free tier (~80 credits/month), 1080p output, and the Pikaformance lip-sync feature for spokesperson-style content.
items.why: 免費1080p AI影片加真實物理動態，適合低預算廣告原型測試或快速社媒素材
items.why_en: Free 1080p AI video with physics-accurate motion is ideal for low-budget campaign prototypes and quick social media content tests before committing to full production.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: Adobe CC 7月更新：Lightroom AI 照片自動篩選正式推出
items.title_en: Adobe Creative Cloud July 2026: Lightroom AI Culling Goes GA, New After Effects 3D Depth of Field
items.summary: Adobe CC 7月更新推出 Lightroom AI 照片篩選正式版，After Effects 加入 Advanced 3D 景深效果，Adobe Express AI 助手亦同步增強，全系訂閱即可使用。
items.summary_en: Adobe's July 2026 Creative Cloud update delivers Lightroom Assisted Culling GA — AI-powered photo selection — plus Depth of Field creation in the After Effects Advanced 3D renderer and enhanced AI Assistant in Adobe Express for all CC subscribers.
items.why: Lightroom AI 篩選可省60%後製選圖時間，直接加速廣告活動拍攝後期流程
items.why_en: Lightroom AI Culling can cut post-shoot photo selection time by over 60% — directly speeding up the asset production pipeline for campaign photography.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: Runway Gen-4.5 登頂 AI 影片基準測試，超越 Veo 3.1 同 Sora 2 Pro
items.title_en: Runway Gen-4.5 Tops AI Video Benchmark, Surpassing Google Veo 3.1 and Sora 2 Pro
items.summary: Runway Gen-4.5 喺 Artificial Analysis 文字轉影片基準測試奪冠，超越 Veo 3.1 同 Sora 2 Pro，同步加入負面提示支援同 Seedream 5.0 Lite 互動式圖片轉影片。
items.summary_en: Runway Gen-4.5 claimed #1 on Artificial Analysis's text-to-video benchmark, beating Google Veo 3.1 and Sora 2 Pro. The update also added negative prompt support and Seedream 5.0 Lite for interactive image-to-video editing.
items.why: 頂級影片生成質素現可透過 API 取用，適合整合入廣告素材生產流程
items.why_en: Best-in-class AI video quality is now accessible via Runway API — suitable for integrating premium video generation into agency ad production pipelines.
items.section: 創意生產工具

items.title: WAIC 2026 閉幕：中國主導 WAICO 成立，29國另建 AI 治理框架
items.title_en: WAIC 2026 Closes: China-Led WAICO AI Governance Bloc Launched with 29 Nations
items.summary: 世界人工智能大會2026七月20日閉幕，29國簽署成立 WAICO（中國主導嘅 AI 治理組織），與 G7 AI 框架並行，習近平親赴發表主旨演講，300+產品首發。
items.summary_en: The World AI Conference 2026 closed July 20 with 29 countries signing to form WAICO, a China-led intergovernmental AI governance body running parallel to the G7 AI framework. Xi Jinping delivered the first-ever WAIC keynote; 300+ products debuted.
items.why: 全球 AI 治理正式分裂兩套標準，跨越中西市場嘅品牌合規複雜度將倍增
items.why_en: Global AI governance is now formally split into two parallel tracks — brands managing campaigns across China and Western markets face growing dual-compliance complexity.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 2026 世界盃分析：非官贊商以 AI 即時內容蓋過多個付費主贊助商
items.title_en: FIFA World Cup 2026: Non-Sponsors Outperformed Paid Partners Using AI-Assisted Real-Time Content
items.summary: 2026 世界盃閉幕分析顯示，非贊助商 Kalshi 獲1.26億次瀏覽，超越大部分付費官方夥伴。阿迪達斯係少數例外，麥當勞 Beckham-Henry 廣告曝光量遜預期。
items.summary_en: Post-World Cup analysis shows prediction platform Kalshi achieved 126M views without any official sponsorship, outperforming most paid partners. Adidas was a rare exception; McDonald's Beckham-Henry campaign underperformed on reach metrics.
items.why: AI 輔助即時內容可蓋過大預算官贊合約，係 performance 廣告規劃嘅重要案例
items.why_en: AI-assisted real-time content creation can outpace big-budget official sponsorships — a compelling case study for performance-focused campaign planning pitches to clients.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 美國 AI 政策主管四個月內第三度換人，聯邦監管陷入真空
items.title_en: US AI Policy Chief Resigns — Third to Leave in Four Months, Federal AI Oversight Vacuum Deepens
items.summary: NIST AI 標準中心主任 Chris Fall 辭職，係四個月內第三位離任嘅美國 AI 政策主管，聯邦 AI 合規標準設定機構陷入空窗，行業規範方向不明。
items.summary_en: Chris Fall, director of NIST's Center for AI Standards and Innovation, resigned — the third US AI policy chief to leave in four months. Federal AI compliance standard-setting is in a leadership vacuum with no clear authority on AI safety norms.
items.why: 使用美國 AI 工具嘅品牌宜密切留意各州合規法規，聯邦層面暫無定案
items.why_en: Brands using US AI tools for campaigns should monitor state-level AI disclosure regulations closely — federal standards remain on hold with no clear timeline.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: OpenAI 游說美國限制中國開源 AI 模型，引發業界論戰
items.title_en: OpenAI Lobbies US Government to Restrict Chinese Open-Weight AI Models, Sparking Industry Debate
items.summary: OpenAI 聯同盟友向美政府施壓，要求限制 Kimi 等中國開源模型喺美傳播。Meta 嘅 LeCun 等批評此舉會壟斷 AI 業界，揭示 AI 開源嘅地緣政治博弈。
items.summary_en: OpenAI and allies are pushing the US government to restrict access to Chinese open-source AI models like Kimi K3. Critics including Meta's Yann LeCun argue this would concentrate power among a few labs and harm global AI research and access.
items.why: Agency 評估用 DeepSeek 或 Kimi 做中國市場工具時，要留意美國政策風險
items.why_en: If US restrictions pass, agencies evaluating Chinese open-weight models for China-market content tools must factor in potential access disruption to their AI stack.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: Natural 融資 $3,000 萬：為 AI 代理人打造自主支付基礎設施
items.title_en: Natural Raises $30M to Build Payment Infrastructure for Autonomous AI Agents
items.summary: 初創 Natural 融資 $3,000 萬，專為 AI 代理人打造支付基礎設施，支援 AI 自主向供應商付費、向其他代理人結算，填補 Stripe 尚未處理嘅缺口。
items.summary_en: Startup Natural raised $30M to build payment infrastructure enabling AI agents to transact autonomously — paying vendors, collecting fees, and settling with other agents. It targets structural gaps in existing payments infrastructure not built for agentic AI.
items.why: AI 代理人經濟正形成，日後建自主廣告採購 bot 時，此類支付基礎設施值得留意
items.why_en: The AI agent economy is forming fast — agencies building autonomous campaign management or media buying bots will need agentic payment infrastructure in the near future.
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: 即學技巧：小紅書 AI 內容標識合規四步操作，即時執行
items.title_en: Quick Tip: 4-Step XHS AI Content Disclosure Compliance Checklist — Action Required Now
items.summary: 小紅書 AI 標識即時生效：① 核查全部 KOC 帳號有否 AI 工具代操；② 含 AI 元素帖文加「AI生成內容」標籤；③ 商業帖須雙重披露；④ AI 代操帳號即轉人工運營。
items.summary_en: XHS AI labels are effective now. Four-step checklist: ① Audit all KOC accounts for AI automation tools; ② Add 'AI-generated content' tags to posts with AI elements; ③ Apply dual disclosure on commercial posts; ④ Switch AI-operated accounts to manual control.
items.why: 未合規帳號隨時被限流或封號，帶走整個品牌 KOC 矩陣，立即核查帳號狀態
items.why_en: Non-compliant accounts risk immediate traffic restrictions or bans — potentially wiping out an entire KOC matrix overnight. Audit all accounts today.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 即學技巧：Meta Andromeda 時代嘅廣告素材輪替方程式
items.title_en: Quick Tip: The Optimal Creative Rotation Formula for Meta's Andromeda Era
items.summary: Meta Andromeda 後最高效做法：每廣告組保持8-12款不同風格素材，每2-3週更新，每款測試至少7天再下架。素材款數同更新頻率係而家 Meta 表現嘅最核心槓桿。
items.summary_en: Post-Andromeda optimal strategy: maintain 8–12 diverse creatives per ad set, refresh every 2–3 weeks, and run each creative for at least 7 days before removing. Creative variety and refresh frequency are now the primary ROAS levers on Meta.
items.why: 今日起重組廣告素材策略，無需改預算，只需增加素材款數同更新頻率
items.why_en: Restructure your Meta creative strategy today — no budget changes needed, just increase creative variety and refresh frequency to immediately boost ROAS.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 即學技巧：Adobe Lightroom AI 自動篩相正式版，一鍵省60%選圖時間
items.title_en: Quick Tip: Adobe Lightroom AI Culling Is Now GA — Cut Post-Shoot Photo Selection Time by 60%+
items.summary: Lightroom Assisted Culling 正式推出，AI 自動分析拍攝批次並評分標注，用戶只需審核 AI 推薦嘅精選相，而非逐張過。適用所有 Creative Cloud 訂閱，無需額外費用。
items.summary_en: Lightroom Assisted Culling is now generally available. AI automatically analyses and scores entire photo shoots, surfacing the best shots for review. Available to all Creative Cloud subscribers at no extra cost — no additional add-on needed.
items.why: 廣告拍攝後期選圖工序可省時逾60%，立即整合入 campaign 後製流程
items.why_en: Campaign photography post-production can save over 60% of selection time — integrate Lightroom AI Culling into your standard post-shoot workflow immediately.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 即學技巧：TikTok Ads MCP Server 讓 AI 代理人直接管理廣告活動
items.title_en: Quick Tip: TikTok Ads MCP Server Now Open — Connect AI Agents Directly to Campaign Management
items.summary: TikTok 已開放 Ads MCP Server，允許開發者連接 AI 代理人直接操作 TikTok 廣告 API，包括建立廣告、調整預算同分析效果，無需人工手動操作後台。
items.summary_en: TikTok's Ads MCP Server is now available, letting developers connect AI agents to directly create ads, adjust budgets and analyse performance via the TikTok Ads API — no manual platform interaction required for routine operations.
items.why: Agency 技術團隊可接 AI Agent 到 TikTok Ads，實現廣告管理流程半自動化
items.why_en: Agency tech teams can connect AI agents to TikTok Ads API for semi-automated campaign management — cutting repetitive manual ops across large account portfolios.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法

items.title: 即學技巧：7月27日 Kimi K3 公開後，點快速評估用喺中文內容生產
items.title_en: Quick Tip: How to Rapidly Evaluate Kimi K3 for Chinese Content Production When It Drops July 27
items.summary: Kimi K3 七月27日公開，建議評估步驟：測試中文廣告文案生成質素、與現有模型比較、計算實際成本（每百萬 token 約$3）。1M token 上下文特別適合一次過讀大量素材。
items.summary_en: Kimi K3 open weights drop July 27. Recommended evaluation: test Chinese ad copy generation quality, benchmark against your current model outputs, and calculate real cost ($3/million tokens vs GPT-5-class). The 1M token context handles large brief batches in one pass.
items.why: 七月27日立即試用，質素達標即可降低中文內容生產成本
items.why_en: Test Kimi K3 immediately on July 27 — if quality holds, agencies can shift China-market content production to a significantly lower-cost model the same week.
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
